Message.SourceString: Now, I have an enormously unpleasant cleanup to do. So you'll forgive me if I get back to work.
Message.LocalizedString: Now, I have an enormously unpleasant cleanup to do. So you'll forgive me if I get back to work.

Message.SourceString: While you're around and if you have time to spare - which you do, I've checked my list - go and speak to Postie Pete. He has something he could use your help with.
Message.LocalizedString: While you're around and if you have time to spare - which you do, I've checked my list - go and speak to Postie Pete. He has something he could use your help with.

Message.SourceString: Hrmm, you appear to be a little overburdened. Shed yourself some of thy worldly trappings and then come speak to me again.
Message.LocalizedString: Hrmm, you appear to be a little overburdened. Shed yourself some of thy worldly trappings and then come speak to me again.

Message.SourceString: Forgive me, but I must focus my attention elsewhere. There is an enormous backlog in Fellhollow that I need to clear up.
Message.LocalizedString: Forgive me, but I must focus my attention elsewhere. There is an enormous backlog in Fellhollow that I need to clear up.

Message.SourceString: Here let me take that dragon head from you.
Message.LocalizedString: Here let me take that dragon head from you.

Message.SourceString: A foul thing, really. Corrupted beyond repair. I almost pity her. Still, you're not interested in that, I feel you'll enjoy this much more.
Message.LocalizedString: A foul thing, really. Corrupted beyond repair. I almost pity her. Still, you're not interested in that, I feel you'll enjoy this much more.
